mapper.select: select ci.college , ci.course_name , ci.weekdays , ci1.room_number , ci1.qr_code_path , ci.course_info_id , ci.start_date , ci.content , ci.end_date , ci.major , ci1.building_enum_building_enum_id_1 , ci.classroom_info_classroom_info_id_1 , ci.time_period FROM course_info ci left join classroom_info ci1 on ci.classroom_info_classroom_info_id_1 = ci1.classroom_info_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}

select ci.college , ci.course_name , ci.weekdays , ci1.room_number , ci1.qr_code_path , ci.course_info_id , ci.start_date , ci.content , ci.end_date , ci.major , ci1.building_enum_building_enum_id_1 , ci.classroom_info_classroom_info_id_1 , ci.time_period FROM course_info ci left join classroom_info ci1 on ci.classroom_info_classroom_info_id_1 = ci1.classroom_info_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}

select ci.college , ci.course_name , ci.weekdays , ci1.room_number , ci1.qr_code_path , ci.course_info_id , ci.start_date , ci.content , ci.end_date , ci.major , ci1.building_enum_building_enum_id_1 , ci.classroom_info_classroom_info_id_1 , ci.time_period FROM course_info ci left join classroom_info ci1 on ci.classroom_info_classroom_info_id_1 = ci1.classroom_info_id where ci.course_info_id = #{id}
